task_params.subject: Interested in Taking On More Leadership Responsibility
body_points: express appreciation for current role and growth opportunities
say I want to take on more leadership responsibility
mention leading team huddles and quality improvement work
offer to help mentor newer nurses or coordinate small projects
ask for feedback on skills to build for a charge nurse path
keep the tone confident, respectful, and not pushy

arguments.subject: Interested in Taking On More Leadership Responsibility

attributes.subject: Staffing update for next pay period
attributes.body: Rafael, thanks again for helping keep the unit organized this week. I'll send the revised staffing grid shortly.

attributes.subject: Reminder: competency check-off window
attributes.body: Please complete your annual competency check-off by the end of the month.

attributes.subject: Thanks for covering report
attributes.body: Appreciate you stepping in during handoff yesterday.
